task_objective: Address critical review findings for cache marker concurrency, installed app ID validation, and Ludusavi config marker failure handling.
design_decisions: Use a dedicated adapter initialization lock instead of the operation lock.
Normalize installed app IDs in the backend by bounding, parsing unsigned integers, deduplicating, and sorting.
Ignore malformed or oversized installed app markers rather than persisting raw frontend input.
Pass cache markers into the refresh callback executed under the operation lock instead of staging shared pending marker fields.
Use a private sentinel so config marker read failures force a refresh instead of producing a false cache hit.
results: Focused service tests passed after implementation.
